frontmatter.title: Hilton Aqua Sol
frontmatter.description: Photos from our stay at the Hilton Aqua Sol Resort in Winter Garden, Florida — pool days, s'mores nights, and the moments that made it our favorite place to stay.

photos.alt: A woman in a white lace cover-up holds a young child wearing a blue and green life jacket by the resort pool, with palm trees and patio furniture in the background
Families swim in the resort pool near lounge chairs and a pool rules sign
Children and adults play with a large colorful beach ball in the resort pool in front of palm trees and hotel balconies
Kids splash and play with a beach ball in the resort pool
An adult stands in the resort pool beside a young child in a green flotation vest, with a pool rules sign and lounge chairs behind them
Guests swim in the main Hilton Aqua Sol pool with resort balconies and flowering bushes visible behind them
A smiling man rides a red mobility scooter along the resort sidewalk near parked cars and palm trees
A girl in a red, white, and blue swimsuit smiles while holding marshmallow skewers outside the resort
A smiling girl in a patriotic red, white, and blue swimsuit holds several long roasting sticks in a wet resort parking area with parked cars and palm trees behind her
Kids wrapped in pool towels roast marshmallows on skewers beside the resort pool at night
A man and several children gathered around the poolside grill at night roasting marshmallows on long skewers
An adult holds a tired child in a green flotation vest beside the resort pool at night
A young woman in a white cover-up holds a child in a green and blue flotation vest near the resort pool at night, with tropical landscaping and patio furniture behind them
A shirtless boy with wet hair wrapped in a blue-striped towel holds a giant marshmallow on a stick on the resort pool deck at dusk, with resort buildings, a vending machine, and palm trees behind him
A girl wrapped in a striped towel holds a s'more while sitting on a patio chair beside the resort pool at night
A girl holding a toasted marshmallow on a skewer stands beside the resort pool at night
A girl makes a silly face during a nighttime poolside gathering at the resort
A girl sits on the resort room couch holding an ice cream cone after a swim day
Two children relax on the resort room couch eating ice cream cones
A young boy eating a chocolate-dipped ice cream cone inside the resort room
A young boy enjoying an ice cream cone in the resort room with family members in the background
Close-up of a young child eating a chocolate-dipped ice cream cone in the resort room

frontmatter.title: Magic Kingdom
frontmatter.description: Photos and videos from our day at Magic Kingdom — Cinderella Castle, the fireworks, and the moments that made the whole trip worth it.

photos.alt: Family in matching Disney 2026 shirts on the ferry heading to Magic Kingdom
Family smiling on the ferry in matching Disney 2026 shirts
Large family group on the ferry in matching Disney 2026 shirts
Family posing on the ferry with kids and stroller
A smiling girl wearing Minnie ears stands on a Disney ferry deck with water and resort buildings in the background
Close-up group photo of family members in matching white Disney shirts standing on a covered ferry deck
Young boy walking up to meet Mickey Mouse in his meet-and-greet room
Mickey Mouse giving a young boy a big hug during meet and greet
Mickey Mouse high-fiving a young boy during meet and greet
Young boy in a stroller holding a Mickey cup with a blue Mickey balloon beside him on Main Street
Young boy smiling in a stroller with a blue Walt Disney World Mickey balloon
A young child sits in a stroller at Magic Kingdom holding a Mickey cup, with a clear blue Mickey balloon floating beside them
Crowds walk down Main Street U.S.A. toward Cinderella Castle under a cloudy blue sky, with colorful Mickey balloons visible on the right
A family group in matching white Disney shirts poses in front of Cinderella Castle on a sunny day, with a blue Mickey balloon, stroller, and wheelchair in the foreground
A smaller family group in matching white Disney shirts poses near Cinderella Castle on a sunny day, with a blue Mickey balloon and stroller beside them
Young child in a stroller holding a vanilla soft-serve ice cream cone at Magic Kingdom
Close-up of child eating vanilla ice cream cone in stroller
Young girl with Minnie ears and a first-visit button holding an ice cream sundae
A boy stands in a shaded Disney park area eating an ice cream treat, with Fantasyland-style buildings and crowds in the background
Family selfie near Dumbo and Storybook Circus with blue canopy and sunny sky
Family selfie in matching Disney shirts under the blue canopy at Storybook Circus
Family selfie near Dumbo area with circus tent flags in the background
Kids in matching Disney shirts riding the Buzz Lightyear Space Ranger Spin
Adults in matching Disney Family shirts on Buzz Lightyear ride loading area
Family in Buzz Lightyear ride vehicle with a Cast Member nearby
Close-up of kids in Buzz Lightyear ride vehicles with laser blaster controls
Inside the Monsters Inc Laugh Floor theater with the show on screen
Laugh Floor stage with pink star projections and a monster character on screen
Laugh Floor audience with guest in sparkly Mickey ears watching the show
Mike Wazowski on the Laugh Floor side screen
Laugh Floor performance screen with a monster character on stage
Fireworks bursting over Cinderella Castle with colorful projection mapping
Cinderella Castle lit with colorful blue, gold, and red projections during a nighttime fireworks show, with gold fireworks exploding overhead and crowds silhouetted in front
Golden willow fireworks cascading over Cinderella Castle
Fireworks arcing from both sides of Cinderella Castle with colorful projections
Dramatic golden canopy of fireworks hanging over Cinderella Castle
Large circular golden firework bursting above Cinderella Castle
Crowd gathered watching the nighttime show at Magic Kingdom
Close view of fireworks over Cinderella Castle with Mickey-ear silhouettes in the foreground
Final golden cascade of fireworks over Cinderella Castle

videos.alt: Cinderella Castle lit in blue and purple projections as the nighttime show begins
Golden fireworks bursting over Cinderella Castle during Happily Ever After

Cinderella Castle lit in warm projection colors during the nighttime show

frontmatter.title: July 11, 2026
frontmatter.description: A Saturday night at Lebanon Valley Speedway — Big Block Modifieds, Twin 20s, and a fireworks show over the dirt track.

photos.alt: Family at Lebanon Valley Speedway watching the races from the grandstands
Race cars on the dirt track at Lebanon Valley Speedway under the lights
Night sky over Lebanon Valley Speedway grandstand and dirt track
Wide view of the dirt oval and grandstand at Lebanon Valley Speedway
Action on the dirt track at Lebanon Valley Speedway
Race action at Lebanon Valley Speedway under the night lights

videos.alt: Big Block Modifieds racing side by side on the dirt oval at Lebanon Valley Speedway
Modifieds charging through the corners with rooster tails of clay at Lebanon Valley Speedway
Pack of race cars coming off turn four at Lebanon Valley Speedway
Fireworks bursting over the grandstand at Lebanon Valley Speedway

frontmatter.title: Savannah Wildlife Refuge
frontmatter.description: Photos from our visit to the Savannah National Wildlife Refuge — alligators, wetlands, and wildlife on the drive home from Florida.

photos.alt: Family group photo at the Savannah National Wildlife Refuge entrance sign
Family posing at the Savannah National Wildlife Refuge sign
Closer group shot at the Savannah National Wildlife Refuge entrance sign
Family arranged around the refuge sign with kids sitting at the base
Wide shot of the group at the refuge entrance sign with sun rays
Wide group photo at the refuge sign with dramatic sky and sunbeams
Bright clear group portrait at the Savannah National Wildlife Refuge sign
Backlit group photo at the refuge entrance sign with sunbeams
Wide backlit group photo at the refuge sign under dramatic clouds
Family group photo at the Savannah National Wildlife Refuge entrance sign
Bright group portrait at the Savannah National Wildlife Refuge sign
Backlit group photo at the refuge entrance sign with dramatic sunbeams
Alligator basking on a log with its mouth open
Alligator stretched out on a long log in the wetlands
Broad marsh landscape with water channels and lily pads
Quiet wetland pool with tall marsh grasses
Close-up of marsh water with floating debris and small dark shapes breaking the surface
Close-up of an alligator basking on a log
Alligator on a log with mouth open, calm reflective water beside it
Large alligator stretched out on a sun-bleached log in the marsh
Alligator lying low on a narrow log in shallow water
Alligator sunning on a log surrounded by marsh grasses
Alligator resting on a bank at the edge of calm marsh water with reeds nearby
Broad wetland scene with still water, reeds, and an alligator near the edge
Wide wetland scene with an alligator resting on a long log near the bottom
Sunlit marsh panorama across the refuge
Cypress swamp with Spanish moss and still water
Alligator warning sign beside dark swamp water
Alligator hidden among tall marsh grasses
Sandy refuge road curving through live oaks with Spanish moss canopy
View from inside a vehicle driving under massive live oaks draped in Spanish moss
Live oaks arching over the wildlife drive with Spanish moss
Alligator watching from the water with only eyes visible
Alligator swimming across open water
Alligator swimming through rippled blue water
Alligator swimming through calm brownish wetland water near the grassy bank
Alligator eyes and snout barely breaking the surface of murky green water
Alligator head floating just above the water surface among small plants
Tight close-up of alligator head floating in water with eyes and nostrils above the surface
Alligator swimming through rippled water near green shoreline plants
Close-up of alligator head poking through brownish-green wetland water
Distant alligator just breaking the water surface
